step_rationale: Plasmin inhibitor; decreased reflects active fibrinolysis and hypofibrinolytic state.
mechanism: Alpha-2-antiplasmin inhibits plasmin-mediated fibrin degradation; its depletion reflects active fibrinolytic turnover and indicates a hypofibrinolytic environment promoting thrombus retention in acute MI.

references.title: Fibrinolysis in patients with acute ischaemic heart disease. With particular reference to systemic effects of tissue-type plasminogen activator treatment on fibrinolysis, coagulation and complement pathways.
